title: bridge-teams/bridge.rs: ClientEvent::Disconnected breaks the loop causing process exit; bridge-matrix does not handle Disconnected at all and never exits on relay drop
description: bridge-teams breaks on ClientEvent::Disconnected (exits main loop); bridge-matrix silently ignores Disconnected and only exits when the channel goes None. Both use connect_with_retry so Disconnected can arrive during shutdown, but the asymmetric handling makes reasoning about shutdown harder for the matrix bridge. Low urgency but confusing to maintain.
